params.size: Position size in collateral units (positive = long)

returns.funding: Positive = trader pays (long pays in premium), negative = trader receives

params.markPrice: Current mark price (e.g., from TWAP), 8 decimals

MAX_FUNDING_RATE().notice: Max funding rate per interval: ±0.05% expressed as 1e18 = 100%

accruedFunding(int256,int256,uint256).notice: Calculate accrued funding for a position.

applyFunding(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Apply funding for a market if an interval has elapsed.

initMarket(uint256).notice: Initialize funding tracking for a new market.

documentation.text: @notice Max funding rate per interval: ±0.05% expressed as 1e18 = 100%
@notice Initialize funding tracking for a new market.

@title FundingRate
 @notice Computes and accumulates 8-hour funding payments for perpetual futures.
         Funding formula (simplified):
           rate = clamp((markPrice - indexPrice) / indexPrice, -0.05%, +0.05%)
         Longs pay shorts when mark > index (premium).
         Shorts pay longs when mark < index (discount).
         The cumulative funding index (per market) lets each position settle
         its accrued funding in one step: funding = size * (index_now - index_entry).
